---
title: "evaluatePexGenes"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
my_file_genes <- "../Manuskript/Tables/PEX_Genes_20211227.xlsx"
my_yifrach_genes <- "../Manuskript/Julia_Analysen/yifrach_bearbeitet.xlsx"

yifrach_genes <- read_excel(my_yifrach_genes)
pex_genes <- read_excel(my_file_genes, sheet="GenesbyFunction")
```
```{r}
yifrach_genes %>% mutate(study = if_else(Gene %in% pex_genes$`approved symbol`,"y","n")) %>% group_by(study, DetectionFrequency) %>% summarise(n = n())
```
